sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n44954" key="eu)ripidaristofani/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐρῑπῐδ-ᾰριστοφᾰνίζω</orth>, <sense id="n44954.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">write in the style of Euripides and Aristophanes</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0434.tlg001:307" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cratin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">307</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
